name: sheets-modelling
description: Google Sheets modelling best practices. Two skills: google-sheets-modelling (FAST, tidy data, colour convention, formula hygiene, 3-pass build with formatting phase and post-write sanity gate) and financial-modelling-extras (DCF, football field, M&A pro forma, synergy structure, paid-vs-captured split). Pairs with the Google Sheets MCP — mandates enable_claude_log before every write.
